HeroSection.title: Rent Offices Tailored to Your Success

FeaturedPropertiesSection.title: Latest Listed Properties
FeaturedPropertiesSection.subtitle: Discover handpicked workspaces in top business districts across the country.

primeLocations.title: Prime Locations
primeLocations.body: Our offices are strategically located in the heart of the city, putting you right where the action is. Impress clients, attract talent, and network with industry peers — all from your prestigious address.

futureOffice.title: The Future of Office Space
futureOffice.body: Discover a new way to work — one that prioritizes flexibility, convenience, and community. Your success is our priority, and we're here to provide the workspace you need to thrive.

easyBooking.title: Easy Booking Process
easyBooking.body: Renting an office with us is simple and hassle-free. Our user-friendly online platform lets you book your ideal workspace in just a few clicks.

community.title: Community and Networking
community.body: Join a vibrant community of professionals and entrepreneurs. Network, collaborate, and exchange ideas in an environment that fosters innovation and growth.

amenities.title: Modern Amenities
amenities.body: Enjoy a comfortable and productive work environment with state-of-the-art facilities. High-speed internet, meeting rooms, ergonomic furniture.

bestPrice.title: Best Price
bestPrice.body: Not sure what you should be paying? Let us guide you — contact us today for a free workspace consultation tailored to your needs.

location.title: Strategic Location
location.body: Located in key business districts near transport, dining, and education hubs. Everything your team needs is within reach.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.body: Our pricing is straightforward with no hidden fees. What you see is what you get, so you can plan and budget with full confidence.

WorkspaceInquirySection.title: Let us find your ideal workspace
WorkspaceInquirySection.subtitle: Complete the form and one of our team members will be in touch with you shortly.
WorkspaceInquirySection.successTitle: Thank you for getting in touch!
WorkspaceInquirySection.successBody: We appreciate you contacting us. One of our colleagues will get back to you shortly. Have a great day!

PropertyDetail.notFoundDescription: The office you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been removed.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

Error.title: Something went wrong
Error.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or return to the home page.
